mapper.sql: id, created_time, updated_time, is_delete, account_id, user_id, account_name, phone, email, account_status, registered_channel, last_login_time
mapper.select: select from auth_accounts where id = #{id} and is_delete = 0 limit 1
select from auth_accounts where account_id = #{accountId} and is_delete = 0 limit 1

select from auth_accounts
order by id desc

select from auth_accounts
order by id desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
mapper.insert: insert into auth_accounts (created_time, updated_time, is_delete, account_id, user_id, account_name, phone, email, account_status, registered_channel, last_login_time) values (#{createdTime}, #{updatedTime}, #{isDelete}, #{accountId}, #{userId}, #{accountName}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{accountStatus}, #{registeredChannel}, #{lastLoginTime})

insert into auth_accounts (created_time, updated_time, is_delete, account_id, user_id, account_name, phone, email, account_status, registered_channel, last_login_time) values
(#{item.createdTime}, #{item.updatedTime}, #{item.isDelete}, #{item.accountId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.accountName}, #{item.phone}, #{item.email}, #{item.accountStatus}, #{item.registeredChannel}, #{item.lastLoginTime})
mapper.update: update auth_accounts set user_id = #{userId}, account_name = #{accountName}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, account_status = #{accountStatus}, registered_channel = #{registeredChannel}, last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, is_delete = #{isDelete} where id = #{id}

update auth_accounts set user_id = #{userId}, account_name = #{accountName}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, account_status = #{accountStatus}, registered_channel = #{registeredChannel}, last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, is_delete = #{isDelete} where account_id = #{accountId}

update.foreach: update auth_accounts set user_id = #{item.userId}, account_name = #{item.accountName}, phone = #{item.phone}, email = #{item.email}, account_status = #{item.accountStatus}, registered_channel = #{item.registeredChannel}, last_login_time = #{item.lastLoginTime}, updated_time = #{item.updatedTime}, is_delete = #{item.isDelete} where account_id = #{item.accountId}
